certificate.description: The certificate issued by the Certificate Authority (CA).

certificate_chain.description: The chain of certificates that validates the CA's certificate.

certificate_signing_request.description: The request submitted for a new certificate from the CA.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Certificate Authority.

key_storage_security_standard.description: The security standard used for storing the CA's key.

not_after.description: The date after which the certificate is no longer valid.

not_before.description: The date before which the certificate is not valid.

revocation_configuration.description: Settings for the revocation of certificates, including CRL and OCSP configurations.

serial.description: The serial number of the certificate issued by the CA.

status.description: The current status of the Certificate Authority.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the Certificate Authority.

usage_mode.description: The intended usage mode for the Certificate Authority.
